name: Versioned Pinned Protocol
summary: Design a curriculum, rubric, scoring system, or protocol where the version is pinned to each artifact that uses it. Once activated, the version row is…
description: Design a curriculum, rubric, scoring system, or protocol where the version is pinned to each artifact that uses it. Once activated, the version row is read-only — a v2 ships as a new row. Mirrors how Stripe API versions, PostgreSQL pg_dump format versions, and ISO standards work.
author: marvelousempire
goal: Deliver versioned pinned protocol output correctly and completely.
